title: Prince Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Prince Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
